actions: Created backend/.ai/ directory structure
Initialized PROJECT_STATE.json with design rebranding mission
Initialized AGENT_HISTORY.json
Created workflow definition: design_rebrand_research.json
Created git checkpoint (commit: 958ac60, tag: cp_init)
Updated PROJECT_STATE.json - moved from initialization to research_design_patterns stage

outputs.reason: Design rebranding requires comprehensive research before planning or implementation

agent_runs.notes: Cold start initialization complete. Routed to research_agent for Phase 1: Research.

actions: Conducted comprehensive research on X/Twitter design patterns (2024-2025)
Researched modern marketplace UI best practices (TaskRabbit, Thumbtack, Fiverr)
Researched dark theme accessibility and WCAG compliance standards
Researched CSS Grid and Flexbox modern layout patterns
Researched glassmorphism UI design techniques
Researched Kenyan market context for mobile-first design
Compiled research into 6 comprehensive documentation files
Created complete design system architecture document
Created detailed 11-week migration roadmap
Updated PROJECT_STATE.json to design_system_architecture stage
Updated all task statuses to completed

outputs.reason: Research complete. Design system architecture documented. Ready for detailed implementation planning.

agent_runs.notes: Phase 1 (Research) complete. All research documents created with comprehensive findings from web sources. Design system architecture specifies X/Twitter-inspired dark theme with orange brand accent, mobile-first approach for Kenyan market, and WCAG AA compliance. Migration roadmap provides 11-week implementation plan with 5 phases.

actions: Reviewed all research documents (.ai/research/*.md)
Reviewed migration roadmap (.ai/plans/MIGRATION_ROADMAP.md)
Analyzed current frontend codebase structure
Updated PROJECT_STATE.json with Phase 1 implementation tasks
Created detailed task breakdown for foundation setup (DW-001 through DW-006)
Set next_agent to implementation_agent for Phase 1 execution

outputs.reason: Research is complete and validated. Project state updated with Phase 1 tasks. Ready to begin implementation of design foundation (Tailwind config, design tokens, base styles).

agent_runs.notes: Orchestrator reviewed all research and confirmed readiness to begin Phase 1 implementation. Current frontend uses generic Tailwind config with primary/secondary blue colors. Need to implement X/Twitter-inspired dark theme with Dumu Waks orange (#f97316) accent. All research documents contain comprehensive specifications for implementation.

actions: Updated frontend/tailwind.config.js with X/Twitter-inspired color palette
Added background colors (#000000, #16181c, #212121, #272727)
Added text colors (#e7e9ea, #71767b, #9ca3af)
Added Dumu Waks brand accent (orange-500: #f97316)
Added semantic colors (success, warning, error, info)
Added extended font sizes (display, heading, body, meta scales)
Added glassmorphism shadows (glass, glass-lg, brand, brand-lg)
Added custom animations (fade-in, slide-up, scale-in)
Created frontend/src/styles/tokens.css with comprehensive design tokens
Added all color, typography, spacing, border, shadow, and effect tokens
Added glassmorphism utility classes (.glass, .glass-nav, .glass-card, .glass-modal, .glass-button)
Added reduced motion support with @media query
Added accessibility utilities (.sr-only, focus-visible, .skip-to-content)
Updated frontend/src/index.css with dark-first approach
Set pure black background (#000000) as default
Added X/Twitter text color hierarchy
Added custom scrollbar styling for dark theme
Created button component variants (.btn-primary, .btn-secondary, .btn-ghost, .btn-glass)
Created input component styles with orange accent focus
Created card component styles
Updated frontend/index.html theme-color to Dumu Waks orange (#f97316)
Verified Inter font integration from Google Fonts
Added accessibility utility functions to frontend/src/lib/utils.ts
Added generateId(), prefersReducedMotion(), getAnimationDuration()
Added announceToScreenReader() for ARIA live regions
Added trapFocus() for modal focus management
Added getContrastRatio(), meetsWCAG_AA(), meetsWCAG_AAA() for contrast validation
Added getAriaCurrent(), getIconButtonAria() for ARIA attributes

outputs.reason: Phase 1 foundation implementation complete. Design tokens, Tailwind config, and base styles are in place. Build passes without errors. Ready for QA validation before proceeding to Phase 2 core components.

innovations: Comprehensive CSS custom properties with --dw- prefix for consistency
Glassmorphism utilities with backdrop-filter and proper fallbacks
Accessibility helper functions for WCAG compliance validation
Focus management utilities for modal/dialog patterns
Screen reader announcement system for dynamic content
agent_runs.notes: Phase 1 Design Foundation implementation complete. All 6 tasks (DW-001 through DW-006) finished successfully. The dark theme is now default with Dumu Waks orange (#f97316) accent throughout. All design tokens from DESIGN_SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE.md are implemented. Build passes in 13.74s with no TypeScript or linting errors. Next phase is Phase 2: Core Components implementation.

checkpoints.description: Research phase complete - All design research documentation created
Phase 1 Design Foundation complete - Tailwind config, design tokens, and base styles implemented
